content: Use VDR for advanced file security and transparency. Set watermarks, automatically index and track all content, restrict downloading and copying.

comment.text: This translation key is used to describe a virtual data room feature, explaining its purpose and key benefits. The translated text will be displayed in a UI context where users interact with this feature, such as a settings or configuration page.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Arabic translation includes a significant hallucination/addition: 'أثناء تعبئة وتوقيع المستندات خطوة بخطوة' (during step-by-step filling and signing of documents), which is not present in the English source text.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: استخدم غرفة البيانات الافتراضية لأمان متقدم للملفات وشفافية. ضع علامات مائية، وارقم وتابع كل المحتوى تلقائيًا، وقيّد التنزيل والنسخ.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The translation adds a completely unrelated clause at the beginning: 'Sənədləri addım-addım doldurub imzalayarkən' (While filling out and signing documents step-by-step), which is not present in the English source.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Təkmilləşdirilmiş fayl təhlükəsizliyi və şəffaflıq üçün VDR-dən istifadə edin. Su nişanlarını təyin edin, bütün məzmunu avtomatik indeksləşdirib izləyin, yükləmə və kopyalamağı məhdudlaşdırın.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Korean translation includes an entirely new clause ('문서를 단계별로 작성하고 서명하는 동안' - while creating and signing documents step-by-step) that does not exist in the English source text, altering the intended meaning.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: VDR을 사용하여 고급 파일 보안 및 투명성을 확보하세요. 워터마크를 설정하고, 모든 콘텐츠를 자동으로 인덱싱하고 추적하며, 다운로드 및 복사를 제한하세요.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Latvian translation includes an entirely different clause ('soli pa solim aizpildot un parakstot dokumentus' - step by step filling and signing documents) that does not exist in the English source, while failing to accurately reflect the core purpose of the VDR as described.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Izmantojiet VDR papildu failu drošībai un pārredzamībai. Iestatiet ūdenszīmes, automātiski indeksējiet un izsekojiet visu saturu, ierobežojiet lejupielādi un kopēšanu.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The translation incorrectly translates 'Set watermarks' as 'Adăugați incripționări' (Add encryptions) and 'restrict downloading' as 'restricționați încărcarea' (restrict uploading). This changes the technical meaning of the feature.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Folosiți CVD pentru securitate și transparență avansată a fișierelor. Setați filigrane, indexați și urmăriți automat tot conținutul, restricționați descărcarea și copierea.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The acronym 'VDR' (Virtual Data Room) was translated as 'VDM', which is a different term and changes the technical meaning.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Používajte VDR na pokročilé zabezpečenie a transparentnosť súborov. Nastavte vodoznaky, automaticky indexujte a sledujte všetok obsah, obmedzte sťahovanie a kopírovanie.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'nalaganje' in Slovenian means 'uploading', whereas the English source text specifies 'downloading'.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Uporabite VDR za napredno varnost in preglednost datotek. Nastavite vodne žige, samodejno indeksirajte in sledite vsebini, omejite prenos in kopiranje.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The translation adds significant information not present in the English source ('在逐步填写和签署文档时' - 'when filling out and signing documents step by step'), which changes the scope of the feature description.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: 使用 VDR 实现高级文件安全性和透明度。设置水印，自动索引并跟踪所有内容，限制下载和复制。
